attempts.strategy: Append the verbatim probe-confirmed body of AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv (with multi-line docstring) plus Target 2's body and docstring, replacing 'end CoverTotality' with the new declarations + a fresh 'end CoverTotality'. Body uses Eq.symm ▸ transport on iter-029's @[simp] toMayerVietorisSquare_toSquare_X₄ : ... = ⊤ to produce IsTerminal X₄ from Mathlib's Preorder.isTerminalTop, then applies iter-034's HModule'_eq_HModule_linearEquiv at this terminal corner. HasExt binders are written with explicit spaces from the start (HasExt.{u + 1}), internalising the iter-034 whitespace-linter lesson.
attempts.code_tried:
noncomputable def AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv
    (k : Type u) [Field k] {X : Scheme.{u}} (S : X.AffineCoverMVSquare)
    [HasExt.{u} (Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology X.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    [HasExt.{u + 1} (Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology X.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    (F : Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology X.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k)) (n : ℕ) :
    HModule' k F n S.toMayerVietorisSquare.toSquare.X₄ ≃ₗ[k] HModule k F n :=
  HModule'_eq_HModule_linearEquiv k F n
    (S.toMayerVietorisSquare_toSquare_X₄.symm ▸
      (Preorder.isTerminalTop (TopologicalSpace.Opens X.toTopCat)))
attempts.goal_before: Post-Edit-1 file with section CoverTotality containing iter-031 → iter-034 declarations + 'end CoverTotality' as the boundary. Target: append two new declarations before end CoverTotality.
attempts.goal_after: File now has the new AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv declaration + AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv_curve declaration inside section CoverTotality, after iter-034's HModule'_eq_HModule_linearEquiv. lean_diagnostic_messages clean (zero errors, zero warnings).
attempts.insight: The Eq.symm ▸ transport pattern combined with iter-029's @[simp] corner-identification lemma + Mathlib's Preorder.isTerminalTop is exactly the right substrate for corner-bridge specialisations. The qualified TopologicalSpace.Opens X.toTopCat form is essential — the bare 'Opens X.toTopCat' would shadow to Scheme.Opens (which expects a Scheme) inside def AffineCoverMVSquare.foo, mirroring the iter-029 sub-namespace shadowing trap. lean_verify confirms kernel-only axioms (propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound).

next_steps: Step 3.5 (corner-bridge) closed. Iter-036 attacks Step 4: the affine-vanishing input H^{>0}(Spec A, F) = 0. Mathlib re-probe required first.

attempts.strategy: Append the verbatim probe-confirmed one-liner body 'S.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv k _ n' immediately after Target 1, in the same Edit 2. Curve specialisation via dot-notation method-call form on Scheme.toModuleKSheaf C for C : Over (Spec (CommRingCat.of k)).
attempts.code_tried:
noncomputable def AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv_curve
    (k : Type u) [Field k] {C : Over (Spec (CommRingCat.of k))}
    (S : C.left.AffineCoverMVSquare)
    [HasExt.{u} (Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology C.left.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    [HasExt.{u + 1} (Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology C.left.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    (n : ℕ) :
    HModule' k (Scheme.toModuleKSheaf C) n S.toMayerVietorisSquare.toSquare.X₄
      ≃ₗ[k] HModule k (Scheme.toModuleKSheaf C) n :=
  S.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv k _ n
attempts.goal_before: Same as Target 1 (single substantive Edit covers both): post-Edit-1 file with section CoverTotality. Target: append the curve specialisation immediately after Target 1.
attempts.goal_after: File now has the AffineCoverMVSquare.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv_curve declaration immediately after Target 1, before 'end CoverTotality'. lean_diagnostic_messages clean.
attempts.insight: The dot-notation method-call form S.HModule'_X₄_linearEquiv k _ n resolves cleanly via lookup against S : C.left.AffineCoverMVSquare, sidestepping the iter-029 sub-namespace shadowing trap that required _root_. disambiguation in the abstract _sequence body. The _ in position 2 (the Scheme.{u} argument to Target 1's general signature) is inferred from the receiver type C.left.AffineCoverMVSquare, which exposes C.left : Scheme.{u}. lean_verify confirms kernel-only axioms (propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound).

next_steps: Step 3.5 (corner-bridge) closed. The curve specialisation feeds directly into the Mayer-Vietoris LES via iter-029's HModule'_sequence_curve_exact, providing the eventual H^*(C, F) ↔ Mayer-Vietoris pieces correspondence on a curve.
